• Educational HTML/CSS/JS web application explaining nuclear energy concepts.
  • Features fission, fusion, and Cold War reactor design comparisons.
  • Includes interactive particle backgrounds and animated 3D reactor visualizations.
  • Optimized for performance with intersection observers and request animation frame.
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { ... });
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { ... });
    requestAnimationFrame(() => { /* parallax logic */ });

This interactive nuclear energy explainer combines scientific education with modern web development. It uses particle systems, SVG animations, and scroll-triggered effects to create an engaging learning experience about fission, fusion, and nuclear reactor history. The code demonstrates performance optimization techniques like intersection observers, requestAnimationFrame loops, and efficient canvas rendering.
